channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Jet fuel price reduced by nearly Tk 40
item.description:
Importance: 73.6 | Covered by: 7 feeds | Reputation: 7.1

Matched titles:
- Govt cuts jet fuel prices for domestic, international flights
- Jet fuel price reduced
- Jet fuel price slashed by Tk39.57 per litre
- Jet fuel price slashed again
- Jet fuel price slashed again
